hero.name: Cao Tan Cong
hero.title: Software Developer
hero.subtitle: Passionate about technology, I love turning theoretical knowledge into practical solutions. I have experience developing Web and Android applications, always learning from new challenges.

about.description1: I'm an Information Technology student passionate about software development. I'm eager to enter the real world and contribute to the technology field, always striving to apply the latest knowledge to create innovative and practical solutions.
about.description2: I have strong skills in Java, PHP, C# and experience with modern frameworks. I focus on writing clean, maintainable code and following software design principles. With a continuous learning spirit, I am committed to delivering high-quality software products.

info.address_value: Tan Binh, Ho Chi Minh City

project1.title: Phone & Laptop Sales App
project1.description: Mobile e-commerce app for buying phones and laptops, built with Android Java, MySQL, PHP API, and Firebase for real-time features.

project2.title: Mobile Phone Sales Website
project2.description: Full-featured e-commerce website for selling mobile phones, built with PHP and MySQL.

project3.title: Restaurant Management Software
project3.description: Desktop application for managing restaurant operations including orders, tables, and reporting, built with Java Swing and SQL Server.

project4.title: Phone & Accessories Store Website
project4.description: E-commerce website for phones and accessories with admin dashboard, built with ASP.NET MVC and SQL Server.

project5.title: Restaurant POS Software (Dev Express)
project5.description: Advanced restaurant management software featuring rich UI components powered by Dev Express, built with .NET WinForms and SQL Server.

project6.title: Shopee-like Web UI
project6.description: Responsive front-end UI inspired by Shopee e-commerce platform, built with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Bootstrap.

job1.title: Full Stack Web & Mobile Developer
job1.description: Developed a full-stack mobile app (Android, Firebase, PHP API) and a PHP/MySQL e-commerce website, plus a Java Swing restaurant management desktop app.

job2.title: ASP.NET & Desktop Developer
job2.description: Built an ASP.NET MVC e-commerce site for phones & accessories and a .NET WinForms restaurant POS system with Dev Express components and SQL Server.

job3.title: Frontend Developer
job3.description: Designed and built responsive web layouts using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Bootstrap, sharpening front-end fundamentals.

edu1.school: Ho Chi Minh City University of Industry and Trade (HUIT)
edu1.description: Studying Information Technology with a focus on software engineering, web development, and mobile application development.

edu2.description: Completed general education with strong results in mathematics and natural sciences.
